case_title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC INC. VS. THOMAS PICARELLO

docket_entries.description: DEMAND FOR JURY ON COUNTER REQUEST TO SET CASE FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT PICARELLO, THOMAS JURY TRIAL SET FOR JAN-10-2011 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON FEB-02-2011 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT THOMAS PICARELLO'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIES THE APPLICATION AS TO JURY FEES AND EXPENSES, COURT REPORTER FEES, AND WITNESS FEES. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

AMENDED STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC INC. ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT PICARELLO, THOMAS
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PICARELLO, THOMAS SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR JAN-10-2011. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL WAS DENIED BY THE COURT. MATTER SETTLED WITH THE JUDGE PRO TEM AND THE CASE WAS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. A STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT WAS FILED.(206)
